title: hieracium sylvaticum subsp. hamulosum
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. hamulosum, a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions in Europe. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. hamulosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
